title: Artanthe gaudichaudiana

intro: Artanthe gaudichaudiana, also known as the Mountain Horsemint or Brazilian Horsemint, is a perennial plant species in the Lamiaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
